---
title: "Internal materials"
description: "Unlisted internal-facing materials for demonstrations and handover."
search: false
toc: false
include-in-header:
  text: |
    <meta name="robots" content="noindex, nofollow">
---

This page lists unlisted internal-facing materials for demonstration, training, and handover.

These pages are not linked from the public navigation, but they are not password protected. Anyone with the URL may be able to view them.

## Available materials

| Material | Purpose | Link |
|---|---|---|
| BNR Hub short tour | Short reveal.js presentation introducing the BNR Hub, its design philosophy, outputs, dashboard, and folder structure. | [Open slides](bnr-info-hub-tour.html){target="_blank" rel="noopener"} |
